Title: Secure Chatbot for bypassing government censorship and surveillance

Overview:
The Secure Chatbot is an AI-powered tool designed to help users circumvent government censorship and surveillance. By using advanced encryption techniques, the chatbot enables secure communication between users while protecting their privacy and avoiding detection by authorities. The platform will provide a safe space for users to express their thoughts and ideas without fear of retribution.

Features:

1. End-to-end encryption: All conversations between users and the chatbot will be encrypted, ensuring that no one can intercept or access the content without proper authorization.
